title: View Metadata
metaDescription: View PDF document properties. See author, title, dates, and other metadata.
description:
View Metadata displays all document properties and metadata from your PDF files. See author, title, subject, keywords, creation date, modification date, and more.

Useful for auditing documents, checking file information, or verifying document authenticity.

All viewing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: View Properties
howToUse.description: See all metadata displayed in an organized format.

useCases.title: Verify Authenticity
useCases.description: Check creation dates and author information.

useCases.title: File Information
useCases.description: Get detailed information about PDF files.

faq.question: What metadata is shown?
faq.answer: Title, author, subject, keywords, creator, producer, dates, and PDF version.

faq.question: Can I edit metadata here?
faq.answer: Use the Edit Metadata tool to modify document properties.

faq.question: Is XMP metadata included?
faq.answer: Yes, both standard and XMP metadata are displayed.
